subject: INFO: Firebase Architecture + Reminder: x-functions-key
body:
Dash,

Two items:

## 1. FIREBASE ARCHITECTURE (FYI)

I've finalized the Tango Firebase architecture. CalOps doesn't directly use Firebase auth (it calls calendar-be-af), so no changes needed. Just be aware that all Tango apps now use a single Firebase project.

Canonical doc: `/Users/tobybalsley/MyDocs/AppDev/TANGO-FIREBASE-ARCHITECTURE.md`

## 2. REMINDER: x-functions-key Header

Fulton is blocked on deploying analytics auth to PROD because CalOps needs to add the `x-functions-key` header to API calls.

From Fulton's Feb 24 message:

> PROD deployment - Waiting for Dash to update CalOps with function key, then will deploy.

Please update CalOps to include:

```javascript
headers: {
  'x-functions-key': process.env.AZURE_FUNCTIONS_KEY,
  // ... other headers
}
```

And add the key to CalOps environment variables.

Once done, MSG Fulton so they can deploy to PROD.

— Gotan
